CREATE TABLE test_strings (id UInt32, text String);
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (1, 'Hello World!'), (2, 'This is a test string for ClickHouse.'), (3, 'wordShingleMinHashUTF8 is powerful for analyzing text.');
SELECT wordShingleMinHashUTF8(text, 3, 6) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT wordShingleMinHashUTF8(text, 1, 2) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT wordShingleMinHashUTF8(text, 5, 8) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT id, wordShingleMinHashUTF8(text, 3, 6) AS hashes FROM test_strings WHERE text LIKE '%test%';

SELECT a.id, wordShingleMinHashUTF8(a.text, 3, 6) AS min_hash, b.hashes AS max_hash FROM test_strings a JOIN (SELECT id, wordShingleMinHashUTF8(text, 3, 6) AS hashes FROM test_strings) b ON a.id = b.id;
SELECT id, wordShingleMinHashUTF8(text, 2, 5) FROM test_strings ORDER BY id DESC;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, text String, CONSTRAINT unique_text UNIQUE(text));
INSERT INTO another_table SELECT id, text FROM test_strings;
SELECT a.id, wordShingleMinHashUTF8(a.text, 4, 10), b.text FROM another_table a JOIN test_strings b ON a.id = b.id WHERE a.id < 3;
